description: Style NoteThese Wynne ballet flats from puma are both feminine and versatile. They feature synthetic upper with synthetic leather trims and a cushioned foot-bed. The rubber outsole adds extra grip making these shoes perfect for urban living.Product DetailsRogue red ballet with synthetic upper, synthetic leather overlays, perforations on the toe region and a strap looping through metal eyelets at the heel counterSlip on style for snug and customised FitBrand tab appliqued on the lateral side of the heel and printed branding on the toe regionCushioned footbed for all day comfortPhylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with arched midfoot, patterned grooves on the forefoot and branded lug on the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
